curation_notes: Re-curation. The patch commit is a merge commit updating cmark-gfm to 0.29.0.gfm.3. The primary fix is in ext/commonmarker/table.c: (1) row_from_string gains a UINT16_MAX bounds check on row->n_columns to prevent integer overflow; (2) try_opening_table_header adds null checks on marker_row and header_row returns and fixes an alignment allocation size mismatch; (3) try_opening_table_row adds a null check on the row returned by row_from_string. Only one non-test source file (table.c) was changed; the other modified files are version bumps and a submodule pointer update. Language corrected from 'ruby' to 'c' since the vulnerability is in the C extension code. L3 hints improved to be distinct from L1/L2 with targeted subsystem and context details.
